basicRepresentations: Status - duly organised and validly existing
Powers - all necessary power to execute and perform
No Violation - does not violate or conflict with laws or agreements
Consents - all governmental and other consents obtained
Binding Obligations - legal, valid and binding obligations
representations.absenceOfCertainEvents: No Event of Default or Potential Event of Default continuing
representations.absenceOfLitigation: No pending or threatened litigation likely to affect legality

taxProvisions.indemnifiableTax: Any Tax other than Tax from present or former connection between jurisdiction and recipient
taxProvisions.stampTaxResponsibility: Each party responsible for own Stamp Tax Jurisdiction
taxProvisions.withholdingTaxLiability: Party must pay liability if fails to deduct or withhold

agreements.paymentOfStampTax: Each party pays own Stamp Tax Jurisdiction taxes

failureToPayOrDeliver.triggerCondition: Failure to make payment or delivery when due

breachOfAgreement.triggerCondition: Failure to comply with any agreement or obligation

creditSupportDefault.description: Failure to comply with Credit Support Document obligations

misrepresentation.description: Representation proves to have been incorrect or misleading in material respect

triggers: Insolvency or inability to pay debts
General assignment for benefit of creditors
Appointment of receiver, administrator or similar
Secured party takes possession of substantially all assets

illegality.description: Becomes unlawful to perform due to change in law
illegality.affectedParty: Party for which performance is unlawful

taxEvent.description: Party required to pay additional amount due to tax action or Change in Tax Law

taxEventUponMerger.description: Tax Event arising from merger of party or Credit Support Provider

creditEventUponMerger.description: Material reduction in creditworthiness after merger

rightToTerminateOnDefault.designationDay: Not earlier than day notice is effective

settlementCombinations.firstMethodMarketQuotation: Settlement Amount in favour of Non-defaulting Party

exceptions: Transfer pursuant to consolidation, amalgamation, or merger
Transfer of amounts payable from Defaulting Party under Section 6(e)

miscellaneous.amendmentRequirement: In writing, executed by each party

methods: In writing, delivered in person or by courier
notices.restrictions: Section 5 or 6 notices may not be given by fax or electronic messaging

definitions.affiliate: Entity controlled by, controlling, or under common control with a person
definitions.changeInTaxLaw: Enactment, promulgation or change in tax treaty, law, regulation or ruling
definitions.consent: Consent, approval, action, authorisation, exemption, notice, filing, registration or exchange control consent
definitions.defaultRate: Cost of funding plus 1% per annum
definitions.localBusinessDay: Day when commercial banks are open for business
definitions.loss: Total losses and costs reasonably determined in good faith
definitions.marketQuotation: Weighted average of quotations from Reference Market-makers
definitions.scheduledPaymentDate: Date on which payment or delivery would have been required
definitions.specifiedIndebtedness: Any obligation for borrowed money (default definition)
definitions.specifiedTransaction: Rate swap, currency swap, commodity swap, equity swap, etc.
definitions.terminationCurrency: As specified in Schedule or freely available and transferable
